holdings.infoBox: NULV is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 7.54%, Meta Platforms at 3.90%, Cisco Systems at 2.66%, Citigroup at 2.20%, and Morgan Stanley at 2.18%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Large-Cap Value ETF (NULV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Large Cap Value index. The fund tracks an index of US large-cap value stocks that score highly on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) criteria. The fund is weighted using a multi-factor optimizer. NULV was launched on Dec 13, 2016 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Large Cap Value
